rationale: h001 failure: model described multi-candidate gating but didn't use 'both candidates' phrasing. Adding to Loop section makes it salient.

content: Accepted versions are never lost — skill files are preserved on disk even if a crash interrupts the memory update; resume detects and completes the interrupted write.
rationale: h035 failure: model explained crash safety correctly but didn't use 'not lost'/'preserved'. Explicit guarantee makes natural phrasing available.
